name: First State Bank Of Purdy
description_short: First State Bank of the Ozarks (formerly First State Bank of Purdy) is a family-owned community bank serving Southwest Missouri since 1944 with FDIC insurance and five convenient locations.
description_long:
First State Bank of the Ozarks has operated for more than 80 years as a trusted financial institution in Southwest Missouri, founded in 1944. The bank remains family-owned after over 50 years of private ownership, emphasizing deep roots in the communities it serves. With five convenient branch locations and a team of dedicated professionals, the institution has evolved from a small-town bank into a dynamic, locally-focused operation while maintaining its commitment to hometown service.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial services tailored to individuals, families, and businesses. Core offerings include free rewards checking accounts through their Kasasa program with high interest rates and cash back opportunities, mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing, agricultural lending for crop expansion and livestock operations, small business loans for startups and expansions, and mobile banking with secure digital access. They also provide online banking with password recovery and enrollment options, and actively promote their mobile apps for full account management.

First State Bank of the Ozarks distinguishes itself through its community-first philosophy, investing in local businesses, schools, and organizations beyond traditional banking services. The bank emphasizes a team-oriented culture focused on collaboration and personal service, combining innovation in digital banking technology with the personalized touch expected from a hometown institution. Their long tenure in the region and family ownership structure suggests decisions guided by integrity and long-term community relationships rather than distant corporate mandates.

As a traditional community bank, First State Bank of the Ozarks is best suited for customers seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making and community investment. However, potential customers should note that as a regional bank, they may have limited branch access outside Southwest Missouri, and their product offerings and rates may differ from larger national institutions or online-only banks.
services: Savings accounts with high interest rates
Online banking with login and password recovery
Mobile banking apps for iOS and Android
Agricultural loans for crop expansion and herd growth
Small business loans for startups and expansions
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Community investment and local lending programs
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Family-owned for over 50 years, ensuring decisions guided by local integrity and long-term relationships
Free rewards checking account with Kasasa program offering high interest rates and cash back
Specialized agricultural lending support for farmers expanding operations and purchasing land
Mobile banking apps with full account access and secure digital features
Five convenient branch locations throughout Southwest Missouri
Community investment beyond banking in local schools, businesses, and organizations
cons: Regional bank with limited geographic footprint (Southwest Missouri only)
Website recently transitioned from fsb-purdy.com to fsbozk.com, requiring customer bookmark updates
No mention of competitive rates comparison or specific APY percentages for checking/savings products
Limited information about fees, minimum balance requirements, or account opening process online
best_for: Southwest Missouri families and individuals seeking relationship-based community banking
Farmers and agricultural businesses requiring specialized lending for land and livestock expansion
Small business owners needing local financing and personalized lending officer relationships
Customers prioritizing community investment and hometown values over lowest national rates
diagnosis: First State Bank of the Ozarks is best for Southwest Missouri residents and businesses seeking community-focused banking with personal relationships, agricultural lending expertise, and local decision-making. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this is a regional bank serving Southwest Missouri only, not suitable for customers requiring national branch access or those seeking the lowest possible rates from online-only competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
